sections.paragraph: & זִלְעָפָה Pl. ־ֹות ( Psa 11:6 Lam 5:10), a violent heat, especially of the wind, Psa 11:6 (the wind called السموم es simûm, i.e. poisonous, is to be understood); of famine, Lam. loc. cit. ( Eze 5:2, compare verses 12 Eze 5:12, 16 Eze 5:16, 17 Eze 5:17, λιμὸς αἴθοψ, Hes. Op. 361; ignea fames, Quinctilian. Declam. xii.; Arabic الجوع بار a fire of famine, Hariri), also of indignation, Psa 119:53.
